Lumen Vase

★★★★★ 4.9 · 147 reviews

A 3D-printed tabletop vase with a smooth, tapered neck and a fluted, sculpted base — designed to catch side-light like a carved column. Fits a slim bunch of dried florals or a single stem. Built in our Bhopal workshop from plant-based PLA.

HandmadeIn Bhopal

The Lumen Vase pairs a soft, hand-thrown silhouette with a precision-printed fluted base — inspired by classical column drums re-imagined for a modern table. At 22 cm tall, it's the right height for dried grasses, preserved baby's breath, or a single sculptural stem.

Each vase is printed on demand in our Bhopal workshop using plant-based PLA, a biodegradable bioplastic made from cornstarch. The matte finish sits beautifully in warm lamplight and photographs exceptionally well.

Note: This vase is designed for dried and preserved flowers only. The inner cavity is not watertight — for fresh blooms, pop a slim glass test tube inside.

  • Height22 cm (Medium)
  • Base diameter11 cm
  • Neck opening2.4 cm
  • Weight180 g ± 10 g
  • MaterialPlant-based PLA (cornstarch)
  • FinishMatte, lightly textured
  • Layer height0.2 mm, vase-mode print
  • Print time~6 hours per vase
  • UseDried & preserved florals only
  • Made inBhopal, India

Your Lumen Vase is designed to last, but it's plant-based — treat it kindly and it'll stay beautiful for years.

Do: Dust with a dry, soft cloth. Wipe gently with a damp cloth for smudges. Use a glass tube insert for fresh flowers. Store indoors, away from direct sunlight.

Avoid: Direct sunlight for long hours · Temperatures above 55°C (don't leave near a heater or in a hot car) · Hot liquids · Dishwashers · Harsh chemical cleaners.

Made to order. Your vase is printed after you place your order. Production takes 2–3 days, then ships within 24 hours.

Delivery: Standard delivery across India within 3–5 business days. Free on orders over ₹1,500. Cash on delivery available.

Packaging: Recycled kraft box · no plastic fillers · fully recyclable.

Returns: 7 days from delivery for unused items in original packaging. Damaged in transit? We'll replace it free, no questions asked — just send a photo within 48 hours.

Can I put fresh flowers with water inside?

The vase isn't watertight by default. For fresh stems, drop a slim glass test tube inside the neck — we can include one free if you leave a note at checkout.

Will the colour fade in sunlight?

PLA is UV-stable for normal indoor use. Prolonged direct sunlight (all day, every day) can lighten dark shades over 1–2 years — we recommend a shaded spot.

Can I get a custom colour or size?

Yes — drop us a line at hello@cubiko3d.in. Custom orders usually add 3–4 days to production.

Is it really biodegradable?

PLA is industrially compostable and breaks down in commercial facilities. At home, it's stable for years — so it won't crumble on your shelf, but it won't sit in a landfill forever either.

Why Cubiko

Three reasons this isn't like the other vases.

01 / Print quality

Precision you can feel.

0.2 mm continuous-spiral printing with no visible layer seams. We've tuned each file over 40+ test prints so the fluted ridges are crisp and the neck is perfectly round.

02 / Made to order

Your vase, your numbers.

Nothing sits on a shelf collecting dust. You pick the colour and size, we print it fresh. Your name is on the job card — no warehouse, no mass production.

03 / Plant-based

Good-looking and kind.

We print with PLA from corn and cassava — renewable, biodegradable, low-odour. Even the packaging is recycled kraft, with zero plastic filler.
